title: polygala sibirica var. ciliata
intro: Polygala sibirica var. ciliata, also known as Cilialtreated Chinese falconeri or Sibirian polygala, is a plant species of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala sibirica var. ciliata include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and respiratory problems.
